meaning: n.忘恩负义者adj.不知恩的,忘恩的
examples: Above the ingrate world and human fears.
Ingrate! A woman who laughs is such a good thing!
Thanksgiving is a small German, ingrate is evil.
Only an ingrate complains that those who brought us these incredible advances prospered.
An ingrate, in any case, cashing out at the Strand.
